name: Hushward Rod
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Unbroken Chant" (support grant, Signatures/GrowthEngine HoldSignature path) — SHIPPED 2026-06-10: at +3 the wielder gains Swiftspell (support 226, +0x98 byte 3 mask 0x08), OR-set + held each tick; stacks with the player's own support pick. Halved spell charge time deepens the anti-Silence identity. p3Desc: 'Grants Swiftspell: the wielder casts in half the usual time.' OPEN LIVE QUESTION: Swiftspell as a LIVE-held bit is unverified — charge time is computed at cast-queue so it should work (it is NOT in the IsBuildTimeOnly set); the GRANT read-back log + one timed cast settles it. Replaces the DRAFT triple stack (invalid multi-grant style).

name: Umbral Rod
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Life Sap" (customRuntime, LifeSap.cs) — SHIPPED 2026-06-10: at +3, a kill credited to this rod restores the wielder by 25% of max HP (Tuning.LifeSapPct=0.25; clamped at full; NEVER revives a 0-HP wielder). Trigger = the per-weapon kill-tally diff (the ExtraTurn freshKill pattern), so attribution rides the proven KillTracker credit. Wielder located via roster resolve + band twin-filter walk (Wielder.cs, shared locator split from ExtraTurn). Heal lands on the authoritative band entry HP, Mem.Writable-guarded. p3Desc: 'Defeating a foe restores a quarter of the wielder's health.' Replaces the DRAFT triple support stack (invalid multi-grant style); the dark rod drinks life — on theme with the Absorb-MP sibling.

name: Dragon Rod
sigNote: SIGNATURE "Wyrmblood" (customRuntime, Wyrmblood.cs) — SHIPPED 2026-06-10: at +3, at each wielder turn edge (TurnTracker), the wielder AND every ALLY within 1 Manhattan tile heal their OWN maxHP/8 (Tuning.WyrmbloodDiv = vanilla Regen rate), clamped at full. EMULATED regen — the Regen status bit is unmapped, never touched; guarded HP writes on the authoritative band entries. Allies positively identified (static-array player-slot fingerprints — never enemies); dead never healed; one heal per fingerprint per splash. Each splash dev-logged. p3Desc: 'The wielder regenerates each turn, and the warmth mends adjacent allies.' Name 'Dragonheart' FORBIDDEN (Dragoon reaction collision). Replaces the DRAFT Regenerate stack with the same fantasy in buildable form.
